name: New Listing Onboarding
description: Complete workflow for onboarding a new luxury property listing

steps.task: Analyze current market trends and comparable sales for the property location
Generate compelling AI-written description with SEO optimization
Verify listing compliance with GLVAR and fair housing regulations
Prepare automated inquiry responses and scheduling templates

name: Client Acquisition
description: Workflow for acquiring and qualifying new luxury real estate clients

steps.task: Analyze client preferences and budget requirements
Provide market insights tailored to client needs
Generate personalized property recommendations and outreach

name: Transaction Management
description: End-to-end workflow for managing luxury real estate transactions

steps.task: Review all transaction documents for legal compliance
Monitor market conditions during transaction period
Coordinate scheduling and communication between parties
